audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via dual enforcement: P2P validation (validateDenebBeaconBlock L328-331) rejects blocks before ingestion, and state transition (verifyBlobCommitmentCount at payload.go:238-241 via ProcessPayload) enforces during block processing. Both use params.BeaconConfig().MaxBlobsPerBlock(slot) which converts slot to epoch and returns schedule-based or fork-based limit.
